content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch against ebfe49877d4c9d0fc55de4a3b81c203e30264495, excluding .ralph-burning runtime state. nix develop -c cargo fmt --check, cargo test --features test-stub, cargo clippy --features test-stub -- -D warnings, and nix build passed. Found two fix-current-bead correctness issues.

## Amendments

1. src/cli/run.rs:916 and src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:366 call the bead-selection flow directly after milestone task completion. That flow reaches src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:5262 and reads plan.json via load_runtime_bead_membership_refs without validating source_requirements_bundle freshness. A requirements re-answer can therefore leave CLI/daemon reconciliation selecting and claiming the next bead from the stale materialized plan, bypassing the new guards added to milestone next/run entrypoints. Move the freshness check into the shared runtime plan-membership load path or require snapshot/requirements stores in select_next_milestone_bead/select_next_milestone_bead_from_recommendation, and add a stale-source regression for post-completion selection.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This leaves an execution consumer of the materialized plan able to silently use stale derived artifacts, which is the core behavior this bead is meant to prevent.
2. src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs:2407-2430 falls back to the embedded bundle when the payload bundle is invalid, but still returns milestone_bundle_id from run.latest_milestone_bundle_id. The materializers then persist that id as the source at src/cli/project.rs:327-337 and src/cli/milestone.rs:383-393 even though the bundle used did not come from that payload. On the next downstream load, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:3809-3823 tries to parse the invalid payload and reports a corrupt source, so a legacy handoff that extract_milestone_bundle_handoff explicitly accepts becomes immediately unusable after materialization. Track whether the authoritative payload was actually used, clear or repair the source id when falling back to embedded state, and add a regression that materializing an embedded-fallback handoff remains fresh.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The new backlink can point at a bundle payload that was rejected during handoff, creating false stale/corrupt failures for compatibility paths that the existing service intentionally supports.
